summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification shard. The job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster and provides no canonical; all listed refs are open pull requests with hydrated live state, no artifact-level security-sensitive items, and no allowed merge/fix/raise_pr path. No close-style action is planned because low-signal and instant close are disabled and there is no hydrated duplicate/superseding canonical.

actions.reason: Independent open PR inventory item; no duplicate/superseding canonical is available and no mutation is safe in plan mode.
